name: TokenTracker
description: Track token usage across 22 AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Roo Code, Zed Agent, Goose, and more) — local-first, zero-config, with a beautiful dashboard, native macOS menu bar app, and 4 desktop widgets.
summaryZh: Track token usage across 22 AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Roo Code, Zed Agent, Goose, and more) — local-first, zero-config, with a beautiful dashboard, native macOS menu bar app, and 4 desktop widgets. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
